title: poa triodioides
intro: Poa trivialis, also known as the Rough Bluegrass or Poa triodioides, is a perennial grass species native to Europe and Asia. The plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Poa trivialis include reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and promoting wound healing. Poa trivialis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for its medicinal use, and it's also sometimes used in traditional medicine and folk remedies.
